title: The One With The Giant Poking Device

lines.text: Monica and Rachel's, Phoebe, Chandler, and Ross are there, Rachel is serving brownies.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Here you go Pheebs. Who else wants one of my special homemade brownies?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I will have one. (Ross and him both take one.)
Phoebe takes a bite and spits it out and screams.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, I'm not gonna have one.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Neither will I. (they both put back the brownies.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No, no, it's just my tooth.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right I'll have one. (he and Ross take another brownie,)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So what's a matter, you need a dentist? I've got a good one.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No thanks, I have a good one too. I just, I, I can't see him.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: See that is the problem with invisible dentists.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why? Why can't you go to him?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Because, every time I go to the dentist, somebody dies.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That is so weird, because every time I go to the dentist, I look down the hygienist's blouse.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Phoebe, what? Umm...what?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, yeah, first there was my aunt Mary, and then there was umm, John, my mailman, and then my, my cowboy friend 'Albino Bob'.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: And all these people actually died?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes, while I was in the chair! That's why I take such good care of my teeth now, y'know, it's not about oral hygiene, I floss to save lives!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Pheebs, come on, you didn't kill anybody, these people just happened to die when you went to the dentist. It's, it's, it's just ah, a coincidence.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well tell that to them. Oh! You can't, their dead.
Opening Credits
Central Perk, Ross, Rachel, and Phoebe are there.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thanks, Gunther. (takes the plate Gunther serves him and Rachel comes up and kisses him) (to Rachel) Hey! (to Gunther) Umm, can I get a napkin too?

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: Oh, like you don't already have everything.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (trying to bite into an apple) Ow! Ow! (drops the apple in disgust.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Phoebe, your in pain, would you just go to the dentist, just go.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right, fine, fine, but if you're my next victim, don't come back as a poltergeist and like suck me into the TV set.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I promise.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Although, don't feel like you can't visit.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering with Monica) Hey, is, is, is Chandler here?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (patting his clothes like he is looking for his wallet) No, no he's not.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You guys, Joey just saw Janice kissing her ex-husband.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What? (to Joey) So what are you going to do? I mean how, how are you going to tell Chandler?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I was thinking about that and I, I think the best way would be, to not.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey, you can't keep this to yourself, if you know about this, you have to tell him.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It'll kill him. I mean it'll, it'll just kill him.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, you could wait 'til I go to the dentist, maybe I'll kill him.
Monica and Rachel's, All are there except for Chandler.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (looking out the window) Ewww! Ugly Naked Guy is using his new hammock. It's like a Play-Doo Fat Factory.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, I'm going to the dentist, so listen, okay, just be on the look out for anything that, that, that you can fall into, or, or that can fall on you, or... All right, just look out! Okay, And um, I also just wanna, I just wanna tell you all that um...... (starts to cry and runs out)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, I have a problem I have to go into work for a few hours, some kids messed up the Homo Sapien display.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What did they do?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, they painted over the word 'Sapien' for one thing, then they rearranged the figures, let's just leave it at that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So, do you want me to watch Ben for you?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes, that's what I was going to ask, thank you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Whoa! Wait! Hello! What about me?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You? You! Want to watch Ben? (in the background Monica mouths 'Don't worry, I'll be here the whole time.' to Ross.) Yes! That'd be great, no, I just wanted to ask Monica, because I know how empty her life is. (Monica sarcastically mouths 'Yeah!' and holds up her thumb.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey-hey, Ross?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I've got a science question.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hmm?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: If the Homo Sapiens, were in fact 'Homo-sapien', is that why there extinct?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Joey, Homo Sapiens are people.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey-hey, I'm not judging.
Monica and Rachel's, Monica and Rachel are babysitting Ben.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (holding Ben) Look Benny, spoon. (moves it back and forth) Spoon. Come on! All right, y'know what I think he's bored.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Here. Ben, do you wanna play the airplane game, do you wanna show Rachel? Come here. (takes Ben) We're gonna do something fun. Okay. (throws Ben up in the air a little bit and catches him) Weee!! (moves into the living room and does it again) Weee!! (starts to walk back into the kitchen as she does it again, and hits Ben's head on that wooden beam across the ceiling.)
[cut to later]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (to Ben) Who's so brave, you're so brave, yes you are, you're so brave.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. Okay honey, he's fine, he's fine, let's just put him down. Come here, Ben. (sets him on the couch) See that's a good boy. (to Monica) How could you do that to him!! Ross trusted me, what is he going to say?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: He's not gonna say anything, because we're not gonna tell him.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: We're not?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No we're not.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: All right, I like that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: So we're okay, we're okay, we're okay, (starts to exam Ben) aren't we? No, we're not okay, we're not okay, there's a bump, there's a bump.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God! Well push it in! Push it in!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I cannot push it in!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, we're gonna need a distraction.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, okay, okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I got it!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: The second that Ross walks in that door, I want you take him back to your bedroom and do whatever it is that you do that makes him go, (high pitched) rweee!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Or. We could put a hat on his head.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: A hat! Yes! We need a hat.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: We need a hat..

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Where are we gonna find a tiny little hat?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, oh, oh, I'll get 'Rainy Day Bear'!! (runs to get him)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Because he'll know what to do? (Rachel comes out of her room with a bear that's dressed in a rain suit.) Oh my God, you're a genius!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh God, oh God, it's sowed on though.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Give it. Give it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.
Monica takes the bear, grabs his hat, and rips off his head.

lines.speaker: Monica and Rachel
lines.text: Oh!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, it's just like a bloodbath in here today.
The street, Chandler and Joey are walking past a jewelery store.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! Hold on a minute, hold on a second. Do you think these pearls are nice?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'd really prefer a mountain bike.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Janice's birthday is coming up, I want to get her something speacial. Come in here with me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoa, whoa, whoa, wait, whoa. Do you ah, want to get her something speacial, get her flowers, get her candy, get her gum, girls love gum.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That's a good idea, 'Dear Janice have a Hubba-Bubba birthday'. I would like to get her something serious.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, you want something serious. Y'know what you should do, you should get her one of those um, barium enemas. Those are dead serious.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right. Look, I'm gonna go in here, and you don't buy me anything ever. (starts to go into the store)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (stopping him) No, no, you can't, you can't, okay, you can't, you can't buy her pearls, you just can't, you can't, you can't.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Why not?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh God. Uh, okay, here's the thing, this is the thing, okay, the thing is...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What is the thing?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. I went down to the 'Mattress King' showroom and, and I saw Janice, kissing her ex-husband.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (shocked) What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: They were in his office.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well she, she wouldn't do that, she's with, she's with me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm telling you man, I saw it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, well, you're wrong! Okay, you're wrong.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm not wrong! I wish I was. I'm sorry. Bet that barium enema doesn't sound so bad now, huh?
Monica and Rachel's, Monica and Rachel are dressing up Ben in the entire rain suit from Rainy Day Bear.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It just makes more sense as an ensemble.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Right.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Besides, it takes the focus off the hat.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (running through the door) No! Oh! You're alive! You're alive!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: See Pheebs, I promised you no one would die, didn't I?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, well, we'll see about that. Can I use your phone? I just wanna call everyone I know.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Sure, we have no money, go ahead.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (on phone) 'Hey! You're not dead! Okay, see ya!'

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Monica.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God! He just said my name! Did you hear that?

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Monica bang!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, I heard that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Did he just say 'Monica bang'?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God! He's gonna rat me out!

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Monica bang!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh-ho-ho, sweetie, sweetie, you gotta stop saying that, now. It's no big deal, it's not even worth mentioning, you see we all do it all the time. See watch this, Ben, Ben, Ben. (goes over and starts hitting her head on the post) Ow, Monica bang! (does it again) Everybody bang. (repeats) Ben bang. (repeats) Rachel bang. (repeats) Bang, Rachel bang! Oh, isn't that fun?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (goes over and hits her head on the post) Look at that! (repeats) Look at that! (repeats) We all do it. (repeats) Okay, I'm stopping now.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You okay?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yeah! Y'know, if it's not a headboard, it's just not worth it.
Chandler and Joey's, Chandler is waiting for Janice to arrive, and is angrily fllipping through a magazine.

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: (entering) How's my Bing-a-ling?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ah, I don't know, you tell me. Anything you ah, wanna tell me, because, if you ah, you should, if you, you would, tell me.

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: Why are your eyes so white?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You tell me! Maybe, it's because I was just fooling with my ex! Oh no-no-no-no, no-no-no-no, that was you!!

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: Oh my God!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right!

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: How did you know?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Joey told me, he saw you two kissing.

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: In the park?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No! In his office! How many kisses were there?

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: Just those two!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Wh-wh-why, wh-why, why, why was there kissing!? There should be no kissing!!

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry honey, I'm so, so, (nasally) haaaaa! I'm so, so sorry, I just (nasally) haaaaaa! But I, oh what happened was, I-I-I can't breathe. Can you get me a bag, or something?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (giving her a bag) Here.
Janice starts to breath into it and sucks in the reciept, and then spits it out.

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: The receipt.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'll take it! All right look, I gotta know. Are you finished with me? (Janice shakes her head no) Are you finished with him? (Janice shakes her head no) Do you still love him? (Janice shakes her head yes) Do you still love me? (Janice shakes her head yes) All right look, (grabs the bag) I'm gonna need an actual answer here okay, so which is it, him or me? (his phone starts to ring)

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: I don't know.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (rushing in) Okay. If you're alive you answer your phone!
Commercial Break
Monica and Rachel's, Monica, Rachel, Phoebe, and Joey are there.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, Ben, I won't tell your daddy that you had ice cream for dinner, if you don't tell about our little bonking incident.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Monica, number one, I don't think Ben understands the concept of bribery, and number two, I... (Joey starts laughing in the background) (to Joey) What?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You said number two.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I also said number one.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know. (giggles harder)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) Hey! Everyone.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: How's my little boy?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: He's perfect, he's never been better.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (noticing the outfit he is wearing) What'd you do, take him whaling?

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Monica.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh my God, he just said your name, that's great! Good job Ben.

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Monica bang!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh that's right, that's what I'd sound like if I exploded.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Woo-Hoo! The curse is broken! I called everybody I know, and everyone is alive.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ugly Naked Guy looks awfully still. (Phoebe runs to the window and gasps.)
[Cut to later, all except Chandler are staring out the window at Ugly Naked Guy.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God! I killed him! I killed another one! And this curse is getting stronger too, to bring down something that big.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well maybe he's just taking a nap.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I'm tellin' ya, he hasn't moved since this morning.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, we should call somebody.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And tell them what? The naked guy we stare at all the time isn't moving.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, we have gotta find out if he's alive.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How are we gonna do that? There's no way.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, there is one way. His window's open, I say, we poke him.
Chandler and Joey's, Chandler is throwing darts, as Joey enters.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! Y'know how we ah, save all those chopsticks for no reason we get when we get Chinese food?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, now we got a reason.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, we're fashioning a very long poking device.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey uh, what's a matter?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I talked to Janice.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh my God, is she going back to him?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: She doesn't know. Says she loves us both. Y'know I woke up this morning and I was in love, well I was happy. Y'know it serves me right for buying that twelve pack of condoms. And now I can't even return them, because she choked on the reciept!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What are you ah, what are you gonna do?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't know, y'know. What, what, would you do?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, it doesn't matter what I would do.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Come on, tell me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, you're probably not gonna want to hear this but ah, if it was me, and this is just me, (Chandler gets ready to throw another dart) I would ah, I would bow out.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What? (turns around quickly still ready to throw the dart and Joey quickly ducks and hides behind the chair) What are you, what are you talking about?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: They have a kid together, y'know. They're like, they're like a family, and if, I don't know, there's chance they could make that work, I know I wouldn't want to be the guy who stood in the way of that. Are you okay? Do you wanna ah, come poke a nude guy?
Monica and Rachel's, Ross has just finished putting Ben to sleep, and is entering from Rachel's room.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, he's finally alseep. About that ah, bump on his head?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Are you, are you, are you sure it's ah, a new bump? I mean, no offense, I've always thought of Ben as a fairly bumpy headed child.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's okay if he bumps his head, kids bump their heads all the time, y'know, it was your first time babysitting, I figured you did the best you could.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (confidently) I did!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I know! I'm saying you have to watch them all the time.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I did!! I watched! I watched! I watched Monica bang his head against that thing!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Monica did it?
Monica runs into the kitchen from the terrace.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Monica?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Umm, did you notice anything wierd about Ben today?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No. Why?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, I was just playing with him, and y'know we were doing the alphabet song, which he used to be really good at, but suddenly he's leaving out 'e' and 'f.' It's like they just ah, I don't know, fell out of his head.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, and also, he's, he's walkin' kind of funny, his left leg is moving a lot faster than his right leg, and he's in there just sort of y'know... (walks around in a circle)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God, I wrecked your baby!! (runs into the bedroom)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I hope it's still funny when you're in hell.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (coming out of the bedroom) You jerk! You know how much I love that kid! (starts to chase Ross around the living room)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Monica bang! Monica bang! (runs into one of the posts) Ow!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'll get the hat.
Central Perk, Chandler and Janice are there.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Janice, I have something I need to tell you, and I want you to let me get through it, because it's, it's, it's not gonna be easy.

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I think you should go back with Gary. I don't wanna be the guy that breaks up a family, y'know when my parents split up, it was because of that guy. Whenever I would see him I was always think y'know 'You're the reason, you are the reason why their not together.' and I hated that guy. And it didn't matter how nice he was, or how happy he made my Dad.

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, well. It's the right thing to do.

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: Oh! You're right. Oh God. But, before I can say 'good-bye', there's something I really need you to know, Chandler. The way I feel about you, it's like, I finally understand what Lionel Richie's been singing about. Y'know, I mean what we have, it's like movie love, you're my soulmate, and I can't believe we're not going to be spending the rest of our lives together.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Then don't leave me!

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Forget what I said, I was babbling! Pick me!

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: No, you were right, you were right. I mean, I-I-I've got to give my marriage another chance.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No you don't! No, no, no, I say you have to give your divorce another chance.

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: (standing up) I'm sorry. (hugs him)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ohhh. Don't go.

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: No, I-I-I gotta go. (she starts to walk away, but Chandler doesn't let her go.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No. No! No! No!

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: Honey, honey, people are looking.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't care! (turns around and to the people watching them) I don't care!!

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: Yeah, um, I'm, I'm leaving now. (tries to get her leg out of Chandler's grasp, she finally does, but Chandler takes off her shoe.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You can't leave! I have your shoe!

lines.speaker: Janice
lines.text: Good-bye Chandler Bing. (walks out with one shoe)

lines.speaker: Gunther
lines.text: Rachel has those in burgendy.
Monica and Rachel's, Joey, Rachel, Monica, Phoebe, and Ross are holding the giant poking device.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right now remember, something this big and long is going to be difficult to manuver, fortunately I have a lot of experience in that area.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Can we please focus here, a naked man's life hangs in the balance!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm telling you he's dead. What we are about to have here is a dead fat guy on a stick.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, ladies and gentlemen, let's poke. (they start to advance the giant poking device) Steady. Steady. Okay, a little higher. Careful of the angle. Okay, okay, we're approaching the window (as he says this the camera cuts to their view of Ugly Naked Guy, so that we actually see him!) Thread the needle. Thread the needle.
They thread the needle and start poking him, he then stirs.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: He's alive! He's a-live!!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And yet, we're still poking him.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, retract the device, retract the device.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: He does not look happy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey-hey, now he's showing us his poking device.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, that's never gonna make it all the way over here, buddy!
Closing Credits
Chandler and Joey's, Chandler is listening to a Lionel Richie album

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (singing) I'll hold you close in my arms. (Phoebe enters) I can't resist your charms. And love....

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (joining him) Love....

lines.speaker: Chandler and Phoebe
lines.text: I'll be a fool for you. I'm sure, you know I don't mind.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (high pitched) No you know I don't mind.

lines.speaker: Chandler and Phoebe
lines.text: Yes! You mean the world the world to me. Oh...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I've found.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I've found....

lines.speaker: Chandler and Phoebe
lines.text: ...in you, my endless (Phoebe goes high pitched, Chandler goes low pitched) love. (they both look at each other.) My endless love. (once again they don't match tones, and they just look at each other)
End
